overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player navigates under elevated highways, crosses busy intersections with futuristic vehicles, and walks past glowing storefronts including 'Masala Studios' before entering a covered pedestrian walkway.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk under the overpass, approaching the intersection ahead

entered.detail: glowing white rectangular billboard mounted on the building facade
massive elevated highway structure overhead with support pillars
green metal safety railing along the edge of the sidewalk
scattered garbage and debris piled against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward past trash debris and a glowing digital billboard, with the sheltered walkway providing cover from the night sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky and traffic
crossing the street as white futuristic cars wait at the intersection
turns left at the corner to follow the sidewalk along the new street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection alongside other pedestrians, then turning left to continue down the street

notable_agents.action: white futuristic sedan waiting at the traffic light before proceeding through the intersection

entered.detail: blue and red illuminated sign reading 'WAVE NEWS' on building facade
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
blue street sign with white text reading 'Farrier' mounted on a pole
multi-story modern building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection beneath the night sky. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while futuristic white cars navigate the traffic. After crossing, the camera turns left past a 'Farrier' street sign, leaving the overpass behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and graffiti art

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs

colorful spray-painted mural featuring abstract designs on metal shutters
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb with glowing taillights

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial street lined with parked futuristic cars, the camera passes vibrant graffiti art and glowing neon signs including the prominent yellow 'MASALA STUDIOS' sign. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights from the storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with industrial ceiling and ventilation

events.description: enters covered walkway with industrial ceiling and exposed ventilation ducts

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered passage following a woman in a green dress ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in a green dress walking ahead of the camera through the covered walkway

entered.detail: large circular ventilation fans and exposed ductwork on the ceiling
thick structural support columns lining the left side of the walkway
red and white vertical banner with asian characters hanging on the right wall
cyan and red fluorescent tube lights illuminating the covered passage

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow covered walkway with an industrial ceiling featuring exposed ventilation ducts and concrete pillars. Following a woman in a green dress, the passage is lit by cyan and red neon tube lights, with Chinese signage visible on the walls as the scene becomes more enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched corridors of a futuristic city. It begins on a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, moving past trash and a glowing digital billboard. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection where the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk amidst futuristic white cars before turning left past a Farrier street sign. The path then shifts toward a commercial street lined with parked vehicles and vibrant graffiti, where the wet pavement reflects the colorful glow of neon storefronts and a prominent yellow Masala Studios sign. Finally, the environment becomes more enclosed as the camera enters a narrow covered walkway, following a woman in a green dress beneath industrial ventilation ducts and cyan and red neon lights.
